phase: Bundle Correlation Engine — map baseline issues to Sprint 1 detectors

arquivos_criados.descricao: BundleCorrelatorImpl - correlates bundle analysis issues to underlying code patterns
14 comprehensive test cases for bundle correlation engine

correlation_engine_features.large_bundle_detection: ✅ Detects bundles >500KB and correlates to sequential animations
correlation_engine_features.dead_code_impact: ✅ Maps dead code items to bundle bloat with size reduction estimates
correlation_engine_features.chunk_fragmentation: ✅ Identifies excessive chunks (>8) and recommends consolidation
correlation_engine_features.n1_query_correlation: ✅ Correlates N+1 queries to runtime performance impact

correlation_mapping.dead_code_12_items: → unused exports/imports → MEDIUM impact + size reduction estimate
correlation_mapping.chunks_over_8: → fragmentation overhead → MEDIUM impact + consolidation suggestion
correlation_mapping.n1_queries: → runtime slowdown → HIGH impact + eager loading suggestion

recommendation_generation.prioritization: HIGH impact first (🔴 CRITICAL), then MEDIUM (🟡 IMPORTANT), then LOW
recommendation_generation.detail_level: Includes specific fix suggestions for each correlation
recommendation_generation.fallback: ✅ Returns 'No significant correlations' if none found

test_coverage.dead_code_impact: ✅ Maps dead code to bundle issues
test_coverage.issue_counting: ✅ Counts analyzed and correlated issues correctly

security_compliance.SEC-02: ✅ Path validation in baseline report (inherited from arena-baseline)

integration_readiness.type_safety: ✅ Full TypeScript typing for report interface
integration_readiness.api_alignment: ✅ Data structure compatible with BundleCorrelationReport interface
integration_readiness.future_correlation_engines: ✅ Pattern establishes reusable correlation framework for other analyzers

correlation_report_interface.correlatedIssues: COUNT of issues with detected correlations

impact.bundleSizeImpact: percentage + KB estimate or 'Minimal optimization opportunities'

notes: BundleCorrelatorImpl complete with full correlation logic. 14/14 tests passing. Maps bundle analysis issues to underlying code patterns from Sprint 1 detectors. Calculates performance impact, estimates bundle reduction, and generates prioritized recommendations. Ready for correlation engine finalization in Sprint 2.2. Next: Task 2.2.4 (React Profiler) and Task 2.2.8 (React integration tests).
